techniques.name: I am Atomic
techniques.description: you become a nuclear bomb, dealing 100% of your ATK as damage to all enemies and yourself. You will be left with 1 HP after using this technique.

techniques.name: Blitz strike
techniques.description: You speed blitz your enemy and cut through their torso in one swift motion

techniques.name: belittling slashes
techniques.description: You deliver multiple slashes to your enemy, effectively belittling them by showing your expertise in swordmanship

techniques.name: Horse Kick
techniques.description: You kick your enemy with the power of a horse, dealing 100% of your ATK as damage.

name: Hollowed Shinigami
description: the technique of a hollowed shinigami.

techniques.name: Getsuga Tenshou
techniques.description: You release a powerful blast of spiritual energy from your sword, dealing 100% of your ATK as damage to all enemies in a straight line.

techniques.name: Getsuga Juujinshou
techniques.description: You release a powerful blast of spiritual energy from your sword, dealing 150% of your ATK as damage to all enemies in a straight line.

techniques.name: BANKAI: Tensa Zangetsu
techniques.description: You enter your bankai state, increasing your ATK by 50% for 3 turns and dealing 200% of your ATK as damage to all enemies in a straight line.

techniques.name: Hollow Mask
techniques.description: You don your hollow mask, increasing your ATK by 25% for 3 turns and dealing 150% of your ATK as damage to all enemies in a straight line.

techniques.name: Cero
techniques.description: You fire a powerful blast of spiritual energy from your hand, dealing 200% of your ATK as damage to all enemies in a straight line.
